summary: Iteration 56 - Read Receipts and Typing Indicators. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with submitkalmori@gmail.com works
Backend: GET /api/messages/conversations returns list
Backend: GET /api/messages/{convo_id} returns {messages: [...], typing: [...]} format
Backend: Messages include 'read' boolean field
Backend: POST /api/messages/{convo_id}/typing returns {ok: true}
Backend: POST /api/messages/{convo_id}/typing returns 404 for non-participant
Backend: Typing status filtered from own user in response
Backend: Newly sent messages have read=False
Backend: Messages from other users marked as read on fetch
Backend: Text messages still work (POST /api/messages/{convo_id})
Backend: GET /api/messages/{convo_id} returns 404 for non-participant
Backend: Typing status mechanism works
Backend: Full message flow with read status works
Frontend: Login with submitkalmori@gmail.com works
Frontend: Navigate to /messages page works
Frontend: Messages page shows 'Messages' title
Frontend: Conversation list displays conversations
Frontend: Clicking conversation opens chat view
Frontend: Read receipt indicators (data-testid='receipt-*') present - 12 found
Frontend: Single checkmark (Check icon) shown for sent/unread messages
Frontend: Double checkmark (Checks icon, purple) code present for read messages
Frontend: TypingIndicator component exists with data-testid='typing-indicator'
Frontend: Header typing indicator code exists with data-testid='header-typing'
Frontend: Message input triggers typing signal on change (sendTypingSignal function)
Frontend: Text messages still work (type + send button)
Frontend: File attachments display correctly (text, audio, image)
Frontend: AudioPlayer component works with play button
Frontend: System messages styled as centered pills
seed_data_creation: Test messages sent during testing for read receipt verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 tested read receipts and typing indicators in the messaging system. All features working: GET /api/messages/{convo_id} returns {messages: [...], typing: [...]} format, messages include 'read' boolean and 'read_at' timestamp when marked as read, POST /api/messages/{convo_id}/typing sets typing status with 4-second TTL in typing_status collection. Frontend shows single checkmark (Check icon, white/40 opacity) for sent/unread messages, double checkmark (Checks icon, purple #7C4DFF) for read messages. TypingIndicator component shows animated bouncing dots when other user is typing. Header shows 'typing...' text. Conversation exists between admin (submitkalmori@gmail.com) and 'Collab Artist' test user.

backend.auto_mark_read: When user fetches messages, other user's unread messages get marked read with read_at timestamp

frontend.ReadReceipt_component: Shows Check (single) for unread, Checks (double, purple) for read

frontend.TypingIndicator_component: Shows animated bouncing dots with '{name} is typing' text
frontend.header_typing: Shows 'typing...' in purple in chat header
frontend.input_trigger: Message input onChange triggers sendTypingSignal (throttled to 2 seconds)
